scripts.dev:backend: pnpm exec dotenv -e ./.env -- pnpm --filter sound-collector-backend start
scripts.dev:frontend: pnpm exec dotenv -e ./.env -- pnpm --filter sound-collector-frontend dev
scripts.build: pnpm exec dotenv -e ./.env -- pnpm --filter sound-collector-frontend build
scripts.test:backend: pnpm exec dotenv -e ./.env -- node --test backend/src/taskProvider.test.js backend/src/fileStorage.test.js scripts/aina/exportDataset.test.js
scripts.aina:seed: pnpm exec dotenv -e ./.env -- node scripts/aina/pushPrompts.js scripts/aina/short_finnish_prompts.json
